caption: R-precision vs pyconfind contacts (degree>=0.001, sep>=6), per predictor, all contacts (sep ≥ 6) only, over 554 proteins. Single-panel high-resolution cut of cmp_contacts_at_R_by_config_and_range.png (same data and styling). Boxplots: box = median & IQR, whiskers = 1.5x IQR, points = outliers, white diamond = mean (labelled). rollout+resample ranks pairs by sampled-completion vote frequency; pairwise by contact-statement log-prob; structure models by pyconfind degree on the predicted structure. Metrics computed by exp89's exact code.
